operatingStatus.additionalInfo: This is not a health care clinic. It provides Veterans who are homeless and at risk of homelessness with one-stop access to community-based, multiagency services to promote permanent housing, health and mental health care, career development and access to VA and non-VA benefits. Walk-ins welcome.

operatingStatus.additionalInfo: South Bexar Outpatient Clinic is still undergoing maintenance. Primary Care appointments scheduled for Monday January 13 are being rescheduled or converted to virtual. Mental Health appointments are not impacted and still scheduled. Labwork can be done at Audie L. Murphy VA Hospital or rescheduled.

Beginning October 14, 2024, the Pharmacy at the North Central Federal Clinic (NCFC) will be closed to renovate the air conditioning system and replace duct work. The renovation is expected to be completed by Spring 2025.
